title: EdoDu
description: Created educational content for EdoDu, an online learning platform, including voiceovers for video lessons and interactive exercises.

title: Econ Sense
description: Produced and edited educational videos for Econ Sense, a project inside ESA that aims to simplify complex economic concepts for students. Responsibilities included video editing, creating engaging visual content, and helping in scripting.

title: AskEcon
description: Provided academic guidance and support to students through AskEcon, a project inside ESA that focuses on answering economic questions and providing resources for learning. Responsibilities included mentoring students and answering queries.
